title: State Government Services PSC
description: A State Government Services PSC officer in India is responsible for implementing government policies, collecting taxes, and providing public services. They work in various departments such as revenue, education, and health. Their day-to-day tasks involve attending meetings, reviewing documents, and interacting with citizens to resolve their grievances.
top_private_colleges: Birla Institute of Technology and Science

career_progression.year_0_2: Probationary period with on-the-job training and mentorship
career_progression.year_3_5: Assist senior officers in policy implementation and public service delivery
career_progression.year_6_10: Lead teams and projects, and take on additional responsibilities
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Limited opportunities for entrepreneurship, but can start a business in a related field
career_progression.global_pathway: Limited opportunities for international postings, but can work with international organizations

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Challenging and competitive, with limited job opportunities
common_misconceptions: It's an easy job with a lot of free time
You can get a job easily with a degree from a good college
